top_signals.title: White House expected to meet with senators to work on ethics concerns in crypto bill
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs’ former top lawyer tells House Epstein was a ‘masterful liar’ who used her to bolster his standing
top_signals.summary: Kathryn Ruemmler said earlier this year she would leave Goldman Sachs at the end of June after fallout over her emails with Jeffrey Epstein.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Todd Blanche defends handling of Jeffrey Epstein files in Senate confirmation hearing
top_signals.summary: Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.

top_signals.title: Codelco pushes Maricunga lithium project start to 2034
top_signals.summary: Chairman Bernardo Fontaine stated the project is now eight years away, delaying the previous 2030 production target.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stani Kulechov on Aave V4, Avalanche, and why RWAs will hit $100 billion this year
top_signals.summary: Aave Labs founder Stani Kulechov on V4's Avalanche debut, disrupting prime brokers, and why RWAs will double to $100 billion by December.
